title: hieracium neocerinthe subsp. sericifolium
intro: Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. sericifolium is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is commonly known as the woolly hawk's beard. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. sericifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or used as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
